$comment: AssessIQ admin Claude Code settings — deployed to ~/.claude/settings.json on the VPS.
This template ships in the repo as the source-of-truth; the deploy procedure copies
to ~/.claude/settings.json owned by the admin OS user.
PostToolUse hook: appends one append-only audit line per Claude Code grading run
The matcher catches the two MCP tools the grading runtime allows.
TODO(phase-2-audit): the hook command points at /srv/assessiq/scripts/grading-audit-hook.mjs
which ships in a Phase 2 follow-up session — until then the hook line silently does nothing
(the file path won't resolve and Claude Code logs a warning but doesn't fail the grading run).
DO NOT add Anthropic API keys here. AssessIQ Phase 1 uses the admin's Max OAuth token
cached at ~/.claude/ (created via `claude login`); see CLAUDE.md AssessIQ rule #1.
